text.title: Agent Observability Stack Blueprint Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Agent Observability Stack Blueprint output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

required.field: ≥2 sentences citing cost, self-host, framework, eval

forbidden.pattern: vendor_pick == 'multi-vendor' or two vendors selected concurrently
otel_instrumentation_status missing any of {traces, judgments, costs, trajectories}

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: vendor_pick populated with a typed value
vendor_pick_rationale populated with a typed value
otel_instrumentation_status populated with a typed value
cost_alert populated with a typed value
drift_dashboard populated with a typed value
first_week_eval_loop populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
